case_title: SUNNIVA ANNE OSEBERG-FINNEY VS. RAMA MODY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF PARTY **MLC SPACES** WITHOUT PREDJUDICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSEBERG-FINNEY, SUNNIVA ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT MLC SPACES
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT MODY, RAMA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT OSEBERG-FINNEY, SUNNIVA ANNE
STIPULATION TO ALLOW CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY OSEBERG-FINNEY, SUNNIVA ANNE MODY, RAMA
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUN-05-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT OSEBERG-FINNEY, SUNNIVA ANNE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-21-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT SUNNIVA ANNE OSEBERG-FINNEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT RAMA MODEY IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY SHWESHA GOVIL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MLC SPACES, WHICH WAS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY THE PLAINTIFF. OTHER APPEARANCES: CONRAD DUNLAP WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF, JAGDISH GOVIL WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT. THE PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT AT COURT RECESS AS FOLLOWS: THIS AGREEMENT IS BINDING BETWEEN RAMA MODY AND SUNNIVA OSEBERG-FINNEY: LANDLORD, RAMA MODY, WILL RETURN SECURITY DEPOSIT AND FIRST MONTH'S RENT (TOTALING $3000) TO SUNNIVA OSEBERG-FINNEY WITH THE CONDITION THAT SUNNIVA OSE-FINNEY WILL VACATE THE PREMISES BY JULY 10, 2022. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 21ST HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE OTHER TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE NOT MET. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 7/11/22. DEFENDANT'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO SUNNIVA ANNE OSEBERG-FINNEY -UNCLAIMED.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MODY, RAMA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT OSEBERG-FINNEY, SUNNIVA ANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF SUNNIVA ANNE OSEBERG-FINNEY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAMA MODY IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF SUNNIVA ANNE OSEBERG-FINNEY IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RAMA MODY IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OSEBERG-FINNEY, SUNNIVA ANNE AS TO DEFENDANT MODY, RAMA MLC SPACES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR [SHWESHA GOVIL - APPEARING] HEARING SET FOR JUNE-22-22
ORDER OF DIMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED MAY-15-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MODY, RAMA
